chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 705 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For orders on CMA No.2640/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.2641/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 17-10-2025 On 10-10-2025, the following order was passed;- “On 16-05-2024, Counsel for the Petitioner was put on notice to satisfy this Court as to the maintainability of instant Constitutional Petition. Thereafter, today the matter has been fixed before the Court; Mr. Lareb Nawaz, Advocate holding brief for Mian Abdus Salam Arain, Counsel for the Petitioner requests for time. Request so made by the Counsel is totally unjustified; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 17-10-2025, when Counsel shall come prepared and address the question of maintainability involved in this Petition.” Today, nobody has turned up on behalf of the Petitioner to address the question of maintainability involved in this Petition. The continuous absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the instant Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
